name: classifier-mode
triggered_when: spec.outputSchema set AND tools[] empty/absent; OR outputSchema absent AND tools[] empty/absent (text-format variant — no phantom tool; raw text return)
dispatch_shape: Single LLM call. When outputSchema set: forced phantom-tool toolChoice constrains output to structured payload per the verdict-shaped schema. When outputSchema absent: free-form text output; no phantom tool registered.
output_form: Schema-validated typed result (when outputSchema set) OR raw text return. Returned as TypedResult.
use_cases: Monitor classify calls (CLEAN / FLAG / NEW verdict-shaped output)
Workflow agent steps requiring structured output
Any agent dispatch where the operator-direction is 'transform input X into structured output Y'
